Title: MEET-01-BE-01 Meetings schema (members meetings)
Description:
Goal: Store meetings that members attend.

Acceptance criteria:
- DB: meetings table with fields:
  * id (uuid), title, description (optional), meeting_type
  * start_at, end_at, late_after_minutes
  * status (SCHEDULED, COMPLETED, CANCELED)
  * created_at, updated_at
- Indexes on start_at and status

Title: MEET-01-BE-02 Attendance schema
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- DB: meeting_attendance table with:
  * meeting_id, member_id
  * status (PRESENT, LATE, ABSENT, EXCUSED)
  * recorded_by_user_id, recorded_at
- Unique constraint (meeting_id, member_id)
- Index on meeting_id

Title: MEET-01-BE-03 Meetings API
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoints:
  * GET /api/v1/meetings (list; supports from/to filters)
  * POST /api/v1/meetings (create) [Secretary only]
  * PUT /api/v1/meetings/{id} (edit) [Secretary only]
  * POST /api/v1/meetings/{id}/cancel [Secretary only]
  * POST /api/v1/meetings/{id}/complete [Secretary only]
- RBAC: MEETINGS_MANAGE required for create/edit/cancel/complete
- Audit log on cancel/complete

Title: MEET-01-BE-04 Attendance recording API (bulk)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoints:
  * GET /api/v1/meetings/{id}/attendance
  * PUT /api/v1/meetings/{id}/attendance (bulk upsert list)
- RBAC: ATTENDANCE_RECORD required
- Who can record: Secretary + Chairperson (configurable later)
- Idempotent updates: submitting same list twice does not duplicate records

Title: MEET-01-BE-05 Penalty rules seed for meetings (late/absent)
Description:
Goal: Enable automatic meeting penalties via existing Penalties+GL model.

Acceptance criteria:
- Seed penalty rules:
  * MEETING_LATE
  * MEETING_ABSENT
- Rules are admin-editable later; seed provides defaults
- Each penalty accrual posts to GL as receivable+income

Title: MEET-01-BE-06 Generate penalties on meeting completion (idempotent)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- On meeting completion:
  * For each member with status LATE -> create penalty accrual (MEETING_LATE)
  * For each member with status ABSENT -> create penalty accrual (MEETING_ABSENT)
- Idempotency: no duplicate penalty for same (meeting_id, member_id, rule_code)
- Posts GL journal using existing accounting posting engine
- Treasurer waiver continues via GL reversing journals (already implemented)

Title: MEET-01-BE-07 RBAC: roles mapping for meetings
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Add permissions:
  * MEETINGS_READ
  * MEETINGS_MANAGE
  * ATTENDANCE_RECORD
- Map roles:
  * Secretary: MEETINGS_MANAGE + ATTENDANCE_RECORD + MEETINGS_READ
  * Chairperson: ATTENDANCE_RECORD + MEETINGS_READ
  * Treasurer: MEETINGS_READ (optional)
  * Member: MEETINGS_READ (self UI only)
- Ensure SYSTEM_ADMIN still has all permissions via sync migration

Title: MEET-01-FE-01 Meetings list & details screen
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- List upcoming and past meetings
- View meeting details (date/time, status)
- Secretary sees create/edit/cancel/complete actions (permission-gated)

Title: MEET-01-FE-02 Attendance marking screen
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Select a meeting and load member list
- Bulk mark: Present / Late / Absent / Excused
- Submit updates
- Only Secretary/Chairperson can access (permission-gated)

Title: MEET-01-FE-03 Member view: my meetings + attendance history
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Member can view upcoming meetings
- Member can view their own attendance history
- Penalties linked to meetings appear in Penalties tab (no duplicate UI required)
